inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 cash from operations $6.0M minus illustrative maintenance capital spending $0.0M (trough year), divided by 17.834M diluted shares; 3-year average OCF $13.3M implies ~$0.75/sh before capex
inputs.shares_source: 10-K FY2025 weighted average diluted shares (SEC XBRL); 18.036M common shares outstanding Oct 31 2025
inputs.book_per_share_caveat: GAAP stockholders equity ~$190.8M (assets $311.1M less liabilities $120.3M) / shares; land and water at historical cost, not fair-value dhando floor
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 OCF troughed at $6.0M after land/water sales timing and Sunkist transition; yield-curve base uses dated development distributions plus run-rate ag cash, not trough OCF alone.

optionality_gate.floor_value_note: GAAP book ~$10.70/sh; long-term debt $72.5M FY2025 ($89.9M Q1 FY2026) limits pure asset floor
optionality_gate.overlay_nav_note: Illustrative: haircut management $180M development guide to $120M over 7y (~$6.7/sh PV) plus water/land marks [Assumption]
optionality_gate.notes: Stance gate uses 7-year dated payoff; ag turnaround and Sunkist cadence not in Lawrence FCF₀.

gaap_vs_fair_value.policy_source: 10-K FY2025: approximately 10,500 acres of land, water resources and other assets in California; international farming ~5,100 acres
gaap_vs_fair_value.land_line_item: Land, buildings and improvements at cost

not_in_model_requires_refresh: Per-acre marks on remaining non-strategic land pipeline
Harvest at Limoneira Phase 2 absorption vs management cash-flow table
Sunkist partnership margin impact on normalized lemon economics

segments_or_options.label: Harvest at Limoneira + East Area II development distributions
segments_or_options.evidence: 8-K 2026-03-12: company expects ~$180M total proceeds over seven fiscal years; $10M received FY2025, $15M FY2024

segments_or_options.label: Santa Paula basin water rights monetization
segments_or_options.nav_assumption: [Assumption] partial mark; FY2025 $1.5M gain on water sale at ~$30K/acre-foot

segments_or_options.label: 800 acres non-bearing avocados → full bearing
segments_or_options.evidence: 8-K 2026-03-23: 800 acres estimated full bearing in 2–4 years; FY2026 guide 5.0–6.0M lbs

segments_or_options.label: Lemons, packing, rentals (operating)
segments_or_options.evidence: 10-K FY2025 agribusiness + rental operations; Sunkist partnership from FY2026

bear.notes: Development delays; ag margin pressure; reversion toward book

base.notes: Haircut development guide + normalized ag cash + modest land/water sales

lines.label: Dated development distributions (haircut)
lines.math: [Assumption] 65% of $180M guide over 7y, PV at simple 8%

lines.label: Ag normalization + water/land sales
lines.math: [Assumption] SG&A savings, avocado ramp, episodic water sales

sotp_build.notes: Conservative vs management $180M table; see nav_overlay

bull.notes: Full development table + avocado doubling + water re-rate [Assumption]

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: 800-acre avocado bearing ramp, $10M SG&A savings target, Sunkist lemon optimization, episodic land/water monetization
growth_explanation.bear_risk: Q1 FY2026 revenue cadence shift under Sunkist; long-term debt rose to $89.9M

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: ~10,500 CA acres + water at cost; economic land/water above book

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / acreage?
option_scan.evidence: Harvest at Limoneira + East Area II; non-strategic land pipeline

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Q1 FY2026 adjusted EBITDA loss $7.7M during transition; not zeroed

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF?
option_scan.evidence: Management development cash-flow projections in 8-K exhibits

option_scan.question: Private stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: 50% Harvest JV equity method; distributions in cash flow

option_scan.question: Transitory distribution?
option_scan.evidence: Lumpy Harvest distributions ($10M FY2025 share of $20M JV distribution)

option_scan.question: Embedded in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Rental operations and packing revenue in agribusiness segments

catalyst_paths.impact: Primary dated cash driver in base payoff
Episodic NAV uplift; $1.5M gain precedent FY2025
Volume guide 5.0–6.0M lbs FY2026 scaling up
